error_signature: does not contain requested runner type: python
title: Python runner type not found in n8n task runner
symptom: When attempting to run a custom JavaScript-only task runner, n8n throws an error stating 'does not contain requested runner type: python'. This occurs even when the configuration specifies only JavaScript.
applies_when: Configured to use external task runners
not_this_if: Both JavaScript and Python runners are configured correctly
root_cause: The n8nio/runners:2.3.2 image has a launcher that expects both JavaScript and Python runners to be configured, regardless of the actual configuration in the JSON file. This leads to failures when only one runner type is needed.
fix_steps: Edit the n8n-task-runners.json file to include a Python runner configuration that points to the same settings as the JavaScript runner.
Ensure that the environment variable N8N_RUNNERS_ENABLED_TASK_TYPES includes both 'javascript' and 'python'.
agent_instruction: Modify the task runner configuration to include a dummy Python runner to satisfy the launcher.
